			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Package' xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1438609347176_676856_15119' name='System Structure'>
				<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1459766819896_154312_50049' body='&lt;html&gt;&#10;  &lt;head&gt;&#10;&#9;&#9;&lt;style&gt;&#10;&#9;&#9;&#9;p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}&#10;&#9;&#9;&lt;/style&gt;&#10;&#9;&lt;/head&gt;&#10;  &lt;body&gt;&#10;    &lt;p&gt;&#10;A hydraulic brake circuit has fluid-filled master and slave cylinders connected by pipes.The master cylinder transmits hydraulic pressure to the slave cylinder when the pedal is pressed. When you push the brake pedal it depresses a piston in the master cylinder, forcing fluid along the pipe. The fluid travels to slave cylinders at each wheel and fills them, forcing pistons out to apply the brakes. Fluid pressure distributes itself evenly around the system. The combined surface &#39;pushing&#39; area of all the slave pistons is much greater than that of the piston in the master cylinder. Consequently, the master piston has to travel several inches to move the slave pistons the fraction of an inch it takes to apply the brakes. This arrangement allows great force to be exerted by the brakes, in the same way that a long-handled lever can easily lift a heavy object a short distance. Most modern cars are fitted with twin hydraulic circuits, with two master cylinders in tandem, in case one should fail. Sometimes one circuit works the front brakes and one the rear brakes; or each circuit works both front brakes and one of the rear brakes; or one circuit works all four brakes and the other the front ones only. Under heavy braking, so much weight may come off the rear wheels that they lock, possibly causing a dangerous skid. For this reason, the rear brakes are deliberately made less powerful than the front.&amp;#160;&#10;&#10;    &lt;/p&gt;&#10;&#10;&lt;/body&gt;&#10;&lt;/html&gt;'>
					<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_18_4beta_9250292_1459766727180_127960_49903'/>
				</ownedComment>
				<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
					<modelExtension>
						<ownedDiagram xmi:type='uml:Diagram' xmi:id='_18_2_8c4028a_1440498574292_641741_34414' name='Hybrid Vehicle Structure' visibility='public' ownerOfDiagram='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1438609347176_676856_15119'>

	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433320258628_1108_16884' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433320258628_43676_16883' Text='The vehicle should produce less harmful impacts to the environment than vehicles running on gasoline or diesel.' Id='UN1'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433328285764_629333_16907' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433328285764_35434_16906' Text='The hybrid vehicle should have the acceleration of a typical SUV.' Id='UN3'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329432180_487522_16919' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329432180_516258_16918' Text='The vehicle should achieve at last 4,5 star Euro NCAP safety rating.' Id='UN10'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329491475_475645_16927' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329491475_437173_16926' Id='UN6'/>

ACC shall detect traffic slowing ahead and automatically reduce speed to match. ' Id='SR1' DerivedFrom='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433334681959_393121_17085' TracedTo='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433334681959_393121_17085'/>

	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_3_9250292_1447254353886_308007_17285' base_Class='_18_3_9250292_1447254353886_324675_17284' Text='The vehicle shall drive at least 70 km on quick charge mode.' Id='SR6.2' DerivedFrom='_18_3_9250292_1447255982393_606426_17388' TracedTo='_18_3_9250292_1447255982393_606426_17388'/>
	<sysml:DeriveReqt xmi:id='_18_3beta_9250292_1447329490890_827780_48184' base_Abstraction='_18_3beta_9250292_1447329490889_948236_48183'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_3_9250292_1447254962262_940794_17303' base_Class='_18_3_9250292_1447254962262_498646_17302' Text='The vehicle shall drive more than 1000km on hybrid mode.' Id='SR6.3' DerivedFrom='_18_3_9250292_1447255982393_606426_17388' TracedTo='_18_3_9250292_1447255982393_606426_17388'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1457288625251_8662_47363' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1457288625250_971317_47362' Text='Requirements of charging time on different modes.' Id='SR7'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1457288586412_88106_47357' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1457288586409_405050_47356' Text='The time of vehicle&#39;s battery charging shall be equal or less than 200 minutes on full charge mode.' Id='SR7.1'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1457288676284_974685_47369' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1457288676279_565795_47368' Text='The time of vehicle&#39;s battery charging shall be no more than 45 minutes on quick charge mode time.' Id='SR7.2'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1457431923366_924461_48215' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1457431923366_190284_48214' Text='The vehicle&#39;s battery mass shall not exceed 100 kg.' Id='SR8'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1457432202500_283518_48272' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1457432202500_441758_48271' Text='Vehicle&#39;s battery energy consumption shall be lower than 15 kWh.' Id='SR9'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1457438650345_634641_48727' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1457438650344_303234_48726' Text='Electric Motor Power must be able to reach 96 kW.' Id='SR10'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1459755834615_643067_49547' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1459755834615_780442_49546' Text='The Fuel consumption shall be not higher than 6 l per 100 km.' Id='SR11'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1459835500870_371173_50370' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1459835500870_842638_50369' Text='The brake fluid dry boiling temperature shall exceed 400.' Id='SR13'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1459767516781_665876_50310' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1459767516780_918318_50309' Text='It shall be possible to achieve 100km speed at or under 6 sec. ' Id='SR12'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1459883008645_623383_47833' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1459883008643_380891_47832' Text='It shall be possible to take cargo up to 200 kg.' Id='SR14'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1459883233277_783933_47841' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1459883233276_344104_47840' Text='Designated seating capacity shall be 80 kg.' Id='SR15'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1459883297176_790162_47862' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1459883297175_521971_47861' Text='It shall be possible to exceed 180 km/h speed with HSUV.' Id='SR16'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1459883325808_620186_47870' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1459883325807_346122_47869' Text='The tire diameter shall be 15 inches.' Id='SR17'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1459883399145_336524_47885' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1459883399144_235428_47884' Text='' Id='SR18'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1459953627569_555067_54416' base_Class='_18_4beta_9250292_1459953627569_560966_54415' Text='The maximum cargo space shall be not less than 500 l.' Id='SR19'/>

### ENTRY: BINARY-82f762cb-953c-431f-9551-6160a3fe20ff

- bytes: 5428
- crc32: `7a24c6ed`
- decoded_as: `utf-8`

````text
<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>

<mdOwnedViews>
	<mdElement elementClass='Note' xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1462260344354_625653_46334'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>FONT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>FONT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<fontName>Arial</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='12'/>
				<style xmi:value='0'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='ColorProperty'>
				<propertyID>FILL_COLOR</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>FILL_COLOR_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='-8268550'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>49, 70, 966, 1251</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES2'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p align=&quot;justify&quot;&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;When trying to model a valid system, all design elements have to satisfy requirements. A new glossary mechanism extracts constraint values directly from Requirement texts and you don&amp;rsquo;t have manually to create constraints associated with requirements. It is enough to create satisfy relationship between design element and requirement and simulate the design element.&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;justify&quot;&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;
      
&lt;img border=&quot;0&quot; src=&quot;mdp://attachedFile#_18_4beta_9250292_1462268700405_708130_46647&quot; /&gt;&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;
      
&lt;img border=&quot;0&quot; src=&quot;mdp://attachedFile#_18_4beta_9250292_1462267687777_293133_46261&quot; /&gt;&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;justify&quot;&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;justify&quot;&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;As displayed in the example, the requirement text &amp;quot;at least 70&amp;quot; of the &amp;quot;Quick charge mode distance&amp;quot; requirement is automatically transformed to &amp;quot;distanceOnQuickCharge &amp;gt;= 70&amp;quot; and solved as constraint. When Block is executed, all Value Properties are verified taking count of satisfied requirement and defined value. The values which are marked green satisfy particular requirements (otherwise, if the constraint fails, the values are marked in red).&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;justify&quot;&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;justify&quot;&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;To try feature and see more examples of automatic requirements verification, click &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href=&quot;mdel://_18_4beta_9250292_1457360531327_249805_47187&quot;&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;here&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;justify&quot;&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;justify&quot;&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;Also, you can create constraints directly from value property: right-click a value property and choose &lt;b&gt;Tools &amp;gt; Extract Constraint From Requirement&lt;/b&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;justify&quot;&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;
      
&lt;img border=&quot;0&quot; src=&quot;mdp://attachedFile#_18_4beta_9250292_1462264152555_422063_46484&quot; /&gt;&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;justify&quot;&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p align=&quot;justify&quot;&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;To use this functionality you have to write requirements using condition phrases (e.g. less than, at least) that are defined in the Glossary table. You can check usually used condition phrases &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href=&quot;mdel://_18_4beta_9250292_1457444027291_404793_6766&quot;&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;here&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;. &lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;In addition, you can define your own condition phrases by creating a new Glossary table stereotyped &amp;lt;&amp;lt;requirementTerms&amp;gt;&amp;gt;.&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_18_4beta_9250292_1462260586433_19462_46388'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>FONT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>FONT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<fontName>Segoe UI</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='40'/>
				<style xmi:value='0'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='ColorProperty'>
				<propertyID>TEXT_COLOR</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>TEXT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='-16689253'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>42, 0, 770, 91</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>Extract Requirement Values</text>
	</mdElement>
</mdOwnedViews>
````
